title: Alliance Sports Group (THE PIONEER OF BLOG) ransomware incident

victim.name: Alliance Sports Group (THE PIONEER OF BLOG)

extortion.description: Alliance Sports Group is a designer, manufacturer distributor of innovative, high-quality products consumers love. We congratulate them - they have the pioneer of our blog! We're prepared to show their accounting, finance, legal, insurance, HR, operations and so on and so on - you will see the data they haven't managed to keep secure. Stay to a leak.
